description: Style NoteMake a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality. Product DetailsRed leather handbag, smooth upper, panelled front, one external zippered compartment at the back, one main zippered compartment with an interior mobile pouch and zipped pocket, two short handles, one long adjustable shoulder strap, embossed branding, four legs on the bottomWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustSizeLength: 22 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 8 cm
